hard.next_step: April 2026: Met at Horizon. Very keen in exploring Zycus solutions and have asked for an introductory meeting.
hard.ais_why:
• The SF Description captures the Horizon-event-driven engagement: 'This is the Horizon lead opp - Met with Zycus team in Horizon 2026. 7/04/26 KAYA GULSEN Purchasing Manager had a call with him, he mentioned they are highly interested in Zycus products, they have not replied to the emails because there calendars are completely blocked, they will revert back to us with the schedule for demo.' This is generic 'highly interested in Zycus products' language with no AI/GenAI/agentic framing ‚Äî broad product interest, not AI-specific.
• Merlin and Merlin Intake in product scope plus ML iAnalyze; no ANA, no Agentic AI in product list. BD_Engagement is Unengaged. Zero Avoma meetings on file. KAYA GULSEN is the named buyer-side contact (Purchasing Manager) but the engagement is at pre-demo scheduling stage with calendar-availability friction. There's no captured AI dialogue from KAYA or any other Demiroren stakeholder.
• Medium confidence: clear Description text indicates traditional Horizon-lead-driven discovery motion. Defaulted DOWN at 3/4 boundary given no AI champion or POC evidence. The Description's framing of 'highly interested in Zycus products' is broad-product interest rather than AI-led interest; would re-evaluate after the first demo confirms scope and AI relevance.

north_star_verdict.headline: Horizon-sourced Qualified deal is drifting: 39 days since the last touch (a 28 May call where KAYA GULSEN said she could meet after holidays), still no discovery call or demo booked three months after the buyer asked for an introductory meeting, and no champion or economic buyer engaged across the four-contact roster.
north_star_verdict.math: Created 19 Mar 2026, 109 days old. Reached Qualified 23 Apr 2026; no submission-date series exists (no RFI/RFP/shortlist dates). Close date 19 Mar 2027 is 256 days out, so timing is not the constraint. LastActivityDate 28 May 2026 is 39 days ago and was a rep-initiated outbound call (buyer agreed to meet 'after holidays'), not a buyer-driven step. The buyer's April intro request has not converted to a scheduled meeting, so the motion is stalled at the very first gate: the discovery call.
evidence: LastActivityDate 28 May 2026 (39 days ago): outbound call to KAYA GULSEN, 'can have a meeting after holidays' (rep-side touch, no buyer-driven step since)
Next_Step__c: met at Horizon Apr 2026, buyer asked for an introductory meeting; no discovery call or demo logged since
Zero buyer calls discovered (no Avoma meetings on file for opp, account, or attendees)
Contact roles present: Semih Dogan (Decision Maker, primary), KAYA GULSEN + Gokha Dinc (Evaluators), Fatih Gok (Influencer); no champion, no economic buyer engaged
AIS 3.0 / Negative: broad product interest, no AI-led dialogue despite full S2P + Merlin scope
Amount $200k, 256 days to close: date is credible if engagement restarts, but the first evaluation step has stalled 39 days

metrics.narrative: No quantified business case exists. The only signal is Next_Step__c, which reports Demiroren met Zycus at Horizon 2026 and is 'very keen in exploring Zycus solutions' (Apr 2026), plus KAYA GULSEN's remark on the 28 May outbound call that she 'can have a meeting after holidays'. Neither states a cost, cycle-time, headcount, or spend-visibility number, and Business_Objectives / Customer_Business_Problem carry no value. The full S2P + Merlin scope implies an end-to-end procurement transformation, but the underlying metrics are unconfirmed because no discovery call has happened. The move is to run the requested discovery call and quantify the procurement inefficiency driving this evaluation.
sources: Task 28 May 2026 (outbound call to KAYA GULSEN)

economic_buyer.narrative: No economic buyer is engaged. Semih Dogan (Group Director, Procurement) is the primary Decision Maker on the contact roles, and for a $200k procurement-suite deal he likely sits close to budget authority, but a 28 May outbound call to him returned 'Could Not Connect' and no call has confirmed who signs. Fatih Gok (Finance Controller) is the natural budget-owner candidate given his finance seat, but he is entirely unengaged (no call, no reply captured). With no Avoma evidence and the MEDDPICC economic-buyer fields blank, the budget owner is unmapped. The move is to reach Fatih Gok and confirm through Semih Dogan who controls the procurement budget before commercials.
sources: SF OpportunityContactRole (Semih Dogan DM; Fatih Gok Influencer/Finance)
Task 28 May 2026 (Semih Dogan could not connect)

decision_criteria.narrative: The evaluation criteria are undocumented. No use-case review, RFI/RFP round, ShoeFit/BRD session, or workshop has run, and no Salesforce requirements field carries content. The buyer named only broad interest in 'exploring Zycus solutions' at Horizon (Apr 2026). The product scope (iContract, iSource, ML iAnalyze, iSupplier, eProcurement, eInvoicing, Merlin, Merlin Intake) suggests a full source-to-pay assessment, but which capabilities the buyer will weight is unknown. The move is to establish the criteria on the first discovery call and confirm whether an RFP or formal evaluation is planned.

decision_process.narrative: The decision process is unmapped. The call sequence to read it does not exist: activity history shows only Zycus-initiated outbound calls and Horizon follow-up emails in Apr-May 2026, no buyer-run evaluation events. Four buyer contacts are on record (Semih Dogan, KAYA GULSEN, Gokha Dinc, Fatih Gok), which hints at a small procurement-led committee, but no approval chain, timeline, or step sequence is confirmed (Multiple_approvals / What_is_the_decision_process fields blank). The move is to use the discovery call to get clarity on the evaluation stages and who approves, then influence the process early.

paper_process.narrative: Contracting mechanics are unknown and not yet expected at Qualified stage. No call, task, or field indicates whether Demiroren runs a central procurement channel, requires InfoSec/GDPR review (probable given a large Turkish media/holding group), uses an implementation partner, or has a standard MSA/SOW template. Current_Contract_Expiration is blank, so no contract deadline is forcing the timeline. This is a knowledge gap that is normal this early; visibility would come from the first commercial-track conversation. No action is warranted yet beyond noting it for later.

identify_pain.narrative: The specific operational or financial pain is not articulated. Next_Step__c records that Demiroren is 'very keen in exploring Zycus solutions' after Horizon (Apr 2026), and Parleen Kour's 7 Apr follow-up email to KAYA GULSEN framed a generic Purchasing-Manager challenge ('the challenge is rarely a lack of systems'), but the buyer has not named what is broken today, its cost, or a compelling event. The likely pain owner is Semih Dogan (Group Director, Procurement), but that is inference. The move is to ask on the discovery call what problem they are solving, its impact, and what happens if they do nothing.
sources: Task 7 Apr 2026 (outbound email to KAYA GULSEN)

champion.narrative: No champion exists. Four buyer contacts are on the roster but none is marked Champion and none has shown advocacy (no introductions to power, no shared intelligence, no agenda-driving) because there have been no calls. KAYA GULSEN is the warmest thread, she took the 28 May call positively and said she can meet after holidays, but interest is not championship. Semih Dogan (Decision Maker) has been unreachable (28 May 'could not connect'). The move is to develop KAYA GULSEN or Semih Dogan into a champion on the discovery call by giving them a proof point they can carry to leadership.
sources: Task 28 May 2026 (KAYA GULSEN positive; Semih Dogan could not connect)

competition.narrative: The competitive picture is genuinely unknown, not confirmed sole-source. Competitors__c is blank, the free-text competition fields carry nothing, and zero buyer calls means no verbal mention of a rival. Because this is a Horizon inbound-interest deal that has not reached discovery, we do not know whether Zycus is early in an unformed consideration set or joining a wider evaluation. No competitor can be named from evidence, so none is listed (naming one would be fabrication). The move is to ask directly on the discovery call whether Demiroren is evaluating other vendors and where they are in that process.

deal_movement.summary: The pulse is cooling. The last genuine touch was a 28 May 2026 outbound call where KAYA GULSEN agreed to meet after holidays; since then, 39 days of silence with no discovery call or demo scheduled. The deal was created 19 Mar 2026 off a Horizon 2026 lead, moved to Qualified, and has generated only rep-initiated outreach and opportunity-health prompts, never a buyer-run evaluation step.

items.change: Outbound call to KAYA GULSEN, positive: she can meet after holidays; outbound call to Semih Dogan could not connect
Stage confirmed Qualified; opportunity-health tasks flag decision maker not identified and engagement single-threaded
Post-Horizon follow-up emails sent to Semih Dogan, Gokha Dinc, and KAYA GULSEN by Parleen Kour
Opportunity created from Horizon 2026 lead; amount set to $200k; moved into New Markets division

competitive_position.summary: Competition is unknown, and on this deal the primary threat is inertia, not a rival. No competitor is named in any Salesforce field, no buyer call exists to surface a verbal mention, and the deal has not reached a discovery stage where the buyer would disclose their shortlist. The large full S2P + Merlin scope and Demiroren's enterprise scale imply a multi-vendor evaluation is likely, but that is inference, not evidence, so no competitor is ranked. The real current risk is that a keen-but-passive buyer keeps managing procurement as-is and never converts Horizon interest into an evaluation.

customer_expectations_fit.summary: The buyer's expectations and fit criteria are undocumented. Interest is broad ('very keen in exploring Zycus solutions', Horizon Apr 2026) with no stated must-have capability, integration, or success measure. Fit cannot be assessed until a discovery call captures their requirements.

best_practice_check.summary: The win-strategy priorities for a stalled early-stage Horizon lead: restart the motion, build an advocate, and map budget authority before the deal cools further.
flags: Convert broad Horizon interest into a scoped discovery call now: 39 days silent, no demo booked, buyer keen but passive.
Develop a champion from KAYA GULSEN or Semih Dogan: a $200k full-suite deal has four contacts but zero advocacy.
Map budget authority early: engage the relevant stakeholder in finance and confirm through Semih Dogan who owns the procurement budget.

champion_strength.summary: No champion. Four buyer contacts are on record but none has advocated for Zycus, and no buyer call has happened to reveal one. KAYA GULSEN is the strongest candidate, she took the 28 May call positively and said she can meet after holidays, but that is interest, not advocacy. Semih Dogan (Decision Maker) has been unreachable. Developing an advocate is the leading indicator this deal needs before any commercial step.
champion_strength.source: SF OpportunityContactRole (no Champion role); Task 28 May 2026; Avoma zero calls

ai_positioning_strength.summary: Merlin and Merlin Intake plus ML iAnalyze sit in scope, but no AI narrative has been put in front of the buyer and AIS reads Negative (3.0). The interest captured so far is broad-product, not AI-led, so the agentic story is under-positioned and unproven.

ai_fit_signal.summary: AIS 3.0 / Negative: the Horizon engagement is broad 'interested in Zycus products' language with no AI, GenAI, or agentic framing, and there is no captured AI dialogue from any Demiroren stakeholder. Merlin is in the product bundle but has not been discussed. No call evidence exists to re-rate the field up or down.

items.detail: Buyer keen at Horizon but no discovery call or demo scheduled three months later; the very first evaluation step has stalled.
No economic buyer engaged; Fatih Gok (Finance) unengaged and Semih Dogan (DM) unreachable.
No champion across a four-contact roster; no internal advocate is driving the evaluation.
No pain quantified and no budget confirmed for a $200k full S2P + Merlin scope.

confidence_signals.summary: Engagement is thinning: the last two-way exchange was a 28 May outbound call and no buyer-driven step has followed in 39 days. The buyer is warm but passive, and the deal risks going cold if the discovery call is not booked.
items: 39 days since last activity (28 May 2026 outbound call)

deal_scores_evidence.summary: A Horizon-sourced Qualified lead where Demiroren is broadly keen but passive: the deal has stalled at the first gate with no discovery call booked 39 days after the last touch, no champion, no economic buyer engaged, and AIS reading Negative.

win_position.text: This is an early Qualified lead with genuine but unqualified interest: Demiroren met Zycus at Horizon and asked for an intro meeting, yet three months on there is no discovery call, no pain quantified, and no advocate, so the position is thin.
No economic buyer is engaged: Fatih Gok in finance is untouched and Semih Dogan, the Decision Maker, could not be reached on the 28 May call.
Merlin and Merlin Intake are in scope but AIS reads Negative (3.0) and the AI story has never been put in front of the buyer, so the differentiation is unproven.
KAYA GULSEN took the 28 May outbound call positively and said Demiroren can meet after holidays, giving a warm thread to restart the motion.

deal_momentum.text: Momentum is stalled: the last touch was a rep-initiated call 39 days ago and no buyer-driven step, demo, or dated timeline has followed.
All activity since March has been Zycus outbound calls and Horizon follow-up emails; the buyer has not run a single evaluation event.

customer_commitment.text: Commitment is soft and generic: 'very keen in exploring Zycus solutions' with no Zycus-specific ask, no proposal request, and no named date beyond 'after holidays'.
Four contacts are on record but none has committed time to a working session or introduced Zycus to budget authority.

deal_risk.text: The main threat is inertia: a keen-but-passive buyer keeps procurement as-is and never converts Horizon interest into an evaluation, a no-decision risk rather than a loss to a rival.
No champion and an unmapped economic buyer leave the deal without an internal driver as it drifts toward cold.

champion_strength.evidence: No champion identified across four contacts; zero buyer calls (SF OpportunityContactRole).

customer_preference.evidence: Broad 'interested in Zycus products' language, no competitive comparison or Zycus-specific next step (Next_Step__c, Apr 2026).

engagement.evidence: 39 days silent; last touch rep-initiated 28 May 2026.

critical_signals.text: The last real exchange was a 28 May outbound call where KAYA GULSEN said Demiroren can meet after holidays, but 39 days on no discovery call has been booked.
No rival has surfaced; this is a Horizon inbound-interest deal where the risk is the buyer doing nothing, not losing to a competitor.
Semih Dogan, Group Director of Procurement and the primary decision maker, is on record but has not been reachable by phone since Horizon.
A $200k full source-to-pay plus Merlin scope with no pain quantified and no budget owner confirmed; commercials cannot be justified yet.

business_case.evidence: No ROI, savings, automation, or compliance impact discussed; no discovery call has occurred.

commentary.win_position: Win 0 reflects a weak position: momentum 47 vs stage-expected 50. Offsetting it: momentum 47 vs stage-expected 50.
commentary.deal_momentum: Momentum 47 (roughly flat): Verdict 'Slowing' — momentum stalling. Silence alone was not treated as backward motion.
commentary.customer_commitment: Commitment sits near the earned-from-zero floor: little observable customer investment surfaced. Commitment is earned, so a low value is honest, not a penalty.
commentary.deal_risk: Risk 14 is driven by Verdict 'Slowing' — momentum stalling. Only observed negatives count, so these are real warning signs, not gaps.
commentary.forecast_confidence: Forecast confidence 0 is anchored on the stage win (0), nudged by commitment 8 and momentum 47, and dragged by risk 14. Read is Early Read — a confidence flag (we know less), not a haircut on the score.
commentary.evidence_coverage: Early Read: 3 of 7 evidence dimensions seen (engagement, stage integrity, exec and champion). It labels how much of the picture we have, never the primary scores.
